---
title: "StringTie-Merge Comparison Plots"
output:
  html_document: default
  pdf_document: default
---


```{r setup, include=FALSE, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, fig.align="center"}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE, results='hide', fig.pos = "h", fig.align = "center")

library(grid)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
library(ComplexUpset)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(RColorConesa)

r_source_dir <- if (dir.exists("R")) "R" else "src/plotting/R"

source(file.path(r_source_dir, "00_figure_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "01_config.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "02_themes.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "03_plot_functions.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "04_data_loading.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "05_assembly_functions.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "06_sirv_analysis.R"))
source(file.path(r_source_dir, "07_st_merge_helpers.R"))

out_dir <- plot_creation_dir()
```


```{r check-paths}
check_paths(src_dirs)
check_st_merge_paths(st_merge_dirs)
```


```{r load-and-process}
helper_dir <- if (dir.exists("../../reports/empty_report/helper_functions")) {
  "../../reports/empty_report/helper_functions"
} else {
  "reports/empty_report/helper_functions"
}

all_results <- list()

for (platform in names(src_dirs)) {
  all_results[[platform]] <- list()
  for (method in names(src_dirs[[platform]])) {
    all_results[[platform]][[method]] <- list()
    cat(platform, method, "\n")

    src_dir <- src_dirs[[platform]][[method]]
    paths <- get_paths(src_dir)
    df_lists <- load_df_lists(paths)

    filtered <- process_classification_only(
      df_lists$Bclass_df_list, df_lists$Kclass_df_list, fl_threshold = 1
    )

    st_dir <- st_merge_dirs[[platform]][[method]]
    st_brain_df  <- load_st_classification(st_dir, "brain")
    st_kidney_df <- load_st_classification(st_dir, "kidney")

    ext_brain_combined  <- build_extended_combined_df(filtered$Bclass_df_list, st_brain_df)
    ext_kidney_combined <- build_extended_combined_df(filtered$Kclass_df_list, st_kidney_df)

    brain_plots  <- plot_classification_data(ext_brain_combined,  ext_sample_labels_Brain)
    kidney_plots <- plot_classification_data(ext_kidney_combined, ext_sample_labels_Kidney)

    # TAMA vs ST upset: compare C&J UJCs between TAMA merge and StringTie merge
    tama_brain_df  <- filtered$Bclass_df_list$`Call&Join`
    tama_kidney_df <- filtered$Kclass_df_list$`Call&Join`

    st_brain_full  <- load_st_classification_with_ujc(st_dir, "brain",  helper_dir)
    st_kidney_full <- load_st_classification_with_ujc(st_dir, "kidney", helper_dir)

    brain_tama_st_upset  <- create_tama_vs_st_upset(tama_brain_df,  st_brain_full,  method = method)
    kidney_tama_st_upset <- create_tama_vs_st_upset(tama_kidney_df, st_kidney_full, method = method)

    all_results[[platform]][[method]][["1"]] <- list(
      brain_plots  = brain_plots,
      kidney_plots = kidney_plots,
      brain_tama_st_upset  = brain_tama_st_upset,
      kidney_tama_st_upset = kidney_tama_st_upset
    )
  }
}
```


```{r assemble-brain-bar}
pb_ylims  <- c(0, 160000)
ont_ylims <- c(0, 80000)

brain_plot_1 <- assemble_bar_plots(
  all_results, "brain", 1,
  title    = "Transcripts per structural category; brain",
  subtitle = "Filter: >=1 read",
  pb_ylims = pb_ylims, ont_ylims = ont_ylims
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "brain_bar_filter1_st.pdf"),
  plot = brain_plot_1,
  size = "mouse_10panel"
)

brain_plot_1
```


```{r assemble-kidney-bar}
pb_ylims  <- c(0, 140000)
ont_ylims <- c(0, 70000)

kidney_plot_1 <- assemble_bar_plots(
  all_results, "kidney", 1,
  title    = "Transcripts per structural category; kidney",
  subtitle = "Filter: >=1 read",
  pb_ylims = pb_ylims, ont_ylims = ont_ylims
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "kidney_bar_filter1_st.pdf"),
  plot = kidney_plot_1,
  size = "mouse_10panel"
)

kidney_plot_1
```


```{r assemble-brain-tama-st-upset, fig.width=18, fig.height=14}
brain_upset_1 <- assemble_tama_st_upset_plots(
  all_results, "brain", 1,
  title = "C&J (TAMA) vs C&J (ST) UJC overlap; brain"
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "brain_tama_st_upset.pdf"),
  plot = brain_upset_1,
  size = "st_upset"
)

brain_upset_1
```


```{r assemble-kidney-tama-st-upset, fig.width=18, fig.height=14}
kidney_upset_1 <- assemble_tama_st_upset_plots(
  all_results, "kidney", 1,
  title = "C&J (TAMA) vs C&J (ST) UJC overlap; kidney"
)

paper_ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "kidney_tama_st_upset.pdf"),
  plot = kidney_upset_1,
  size = "st_upset"
)

kidney_upset_1
```


```{r source_data_capture, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# ---- Source Data capture: TAMA-vs-ST UJC upsets (SF19 brain / SF20 kidney) ---
# Each figure binds 10 per-(platform, tool) UpSet panels. The membership matrix
# (all_ujcs) is attached to each upset object via attr(., "source_data") in
# create_tama_vs_st_upset(); aggregate each to plotted intersection sizes and
# bind with platform/tool columns.
.sd_st_bind <- function(all_results, accessor) {
  rows <- list()
  for (platform in names(all_results)) {
    for (method in names(all_results[[platform]])) {
      res <- all_results[[platform]][[method]][["1"]]
      d <- tryCatch(accessor(res), error = function(e) NULL)
      if (is.null(d) || !is.data.frame(d) || !nrow(d)) next
      d <- as.data.frame(d)
      d$platform <- platform
      d$tool <- method
      rows[[paste(platform, method)]] <- d
    }
  }
  dplyr::bind_rows(rows)
}

.sd_st_upset_counts <- function(upset_obj) {
  df <- attr(upset_obj, "source_data")
  if (is.null(df) || !nrow(df)) return(NULL)
  set_cols <- setdiff(names(df), c("UJC", "structural_category"))
  dplyr::count(df, dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(set_cols)), structural_category,
               name = "n_UJC")
}

add_source_sheet("Supplementary Fig 19",
  "Supplementary Fig. 19: C&J UJC overlap between TAMA-merge and StringTie-merge, by structural category, per platform and tool (brain).",
  .sd_st_bind(all_results, function(res) .sd_st_upset_counts(res$brain_tama_st_upset)))
add_source_sheet("Supplementary Fig 20",
  "Supplementary Fig. 20: C&J UJC overlap between TAMA-merge and StringTie-merge, by structural category, per platform and tool (kidney).",
  .sd_st_bind(all_results, function(res) .sd_st_upset_counts(res$kidney_tama_st_upset)))
```
